FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fac0ee8a7a0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-26T21:59:29Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-26T21:57:45Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/26 22:01:07.343988433 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/26 22:01:07.343995444 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344028564 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344029505 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344048714 {
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344049896 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344064367 new <- list()
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344065319 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344080782 new$width <- width
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344081563 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344096015 new$height <- height
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344096716 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344111669 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344112410 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344126130 new$title <- title
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344126831 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344141063 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344141884 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344156105 new$version <- version
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344156877 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344172901 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344173652 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344194869 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344196752 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344211755 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344212596 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344226006 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344226727 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344240828 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344241569 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344257393 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344258415 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344283432 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344284334 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344299787 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344300578 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344315841 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344316722 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344332246 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344333057 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344369096 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344376106 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344405386 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344431980 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344433172 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344447814 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344448655 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344470238 "default"))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344471069 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344499352 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344500283 }
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344512712 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344513493 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344530058 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344530819 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344544600 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344545361 }
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344558591 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344559282 }
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344571741 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344572472 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344586683 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344587644 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344603118 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344603799 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344617870 }
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344618751 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344633173 old$family <- family
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344633894 }
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344646253 version <- old$version
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344647004 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344662177 "2.0")
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344663048 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344676458 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344677199 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344693764 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344694485 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344708366 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344709227 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344723469 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344724140 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344739533 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344740204 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344756659 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344757310 invisible()
2026/05/26 22:01:07.344770710 }
